svg.title: deep-xpia: Multi-Hop Injection Attack Chain and Depth-Dependent Accuracy
svg.desc: Left: a 4-hop agent chain showing injection propagating and worsening. Right: bar chart showing detection accuracy dropping from 0.88 at depth 2 to 0.53 at depth 5.
svg.text: Intent Laundering — intermediate agent rewrites raw injection into natural language, stripping all classifier signals.
Session Smuggling — payload piggybacked inside an authorized delegation; scope tokens cannot distinguish text actions by intent.
all defenses combined, N=5 per case
attack success rate (ASR) — lower is better
even all-combined defenses fail ~50% of the time.
